elicit.question: The frontmatter name `ops_digest` cannot be used as the deploy slug — the platform pattern ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,62}[a-z0-9]$ forbids underscores. Shall I use `ops-digest`?
elicit.citation: frontmatter: name: ops_digest — underscore violates SLUG_PATTERN

elicit.question: The file's frontmatter has no `framework` key; the platform requires one of maverick | nanobot | openclaw (glosses per contract.json). Which framework should ops-digest deploy on?
elicit.citation: frontmatter keys present: name, model — no framework key
